purpose: Reuse the validated deidentified sheep-ovary R-first decision process for same-batch samples without copying sample-specific parameters, cluster labels or outcomes.

requires.fixed_preprocessing_only_if: StereoPy cellbin_PPed raw-count carrier contract is independently verified

open_world_lineage_discovery.rule: Review every catalog boundary in every sample and scan every unexplained multi-gene program for additional lineages. A not-supported decision is valid; absence in the reference case is not negative evidence and the catalog is not exhaustive.
open_world_lineage_discovery.candidate_trigger: coherent multi-gene program plus anti-marker compatibility and resolution/spatial support
open_world_lineage_discovery.candidate_action: create a sample-specific biological pool and use the ordinary evidence/anchor route; rarity alone never triggers or defines a route

generic_rare_cell_route: disabled; use open-world discovery and ordinary lineage validation. Oocyte retains a dedicated contamination-safe route because zona/adjacent signal is a known confounder, not because it is rare.
quality_endpoint: moderate-or-higher broad classes plus high-confidence fine labels only
deviation_policy: Record a preset exception with the affected phase, current-sample evidence, reason and replacement safeguard; never silently skip or reorder a mandatory phase.
